headline: Kyndryl plans job cuts, forecasts pretax profit below estimates
summary: Software provider Kyndryl said it would cut jobs as part of a new cost-saving plan and forecast annual ‌pretax profit below Wall Street estimates on Wednesday.  • The cuts come after the software provider ⁠delayed the filing of its October-December report, made several management changes, and launched an accounting review over "potential weaknesses" found in its internal controls.  ​Kyndryl did not disclose how ‌many jobs would be affected by the move.
